task: I need to send a short note to a classmate about a group project, and I want it to be clear enough that they know what I mean. Can you help me draft something I could actually send?

turns.agent_response:
Yes — keep it short and clear.

### Simple note
**Hey, can you work on your part of the project today? We need it done so we can put everything together.**

### Slightly softer version
**Hey, just checking in — can you finish your part of the project today? That would help us get it done on time.**

### Easy tip
Say:
- **what you need**
- **when you need it**
- **why it matters**

If you want, I can make it sound a little more **friendly** or a little more **direct**.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. The softer one sounds more like me. I could send: “Hey, just checking in — can you finish your part of the project today? That would help us get it done on time.”
